examples: I'll meet you at the top of Thorpe Street.
A few seconds passed before Henry Thorpe made his entrance.
Thorpe was a Native American who excelled at every sport he ever played.
Thorpe featured widely in Japanese advertisements, including promoting a sports drink called "Thorpedo" after his nickname.
Butcher's done a very good job, as have Hussain and Thorpe (when they're fit).
